meaning: n.圆周,圆形物,派系,循环v.围,环绕 盘旋
examples: The children stood in a circle.
He has a small circle of friends.
She walked clockwise around the circle.
That helps build advertising revenues, says sports banker Robert Tilliss, chief executive of Inner Circle Sports.
Trees and well-tended gardens belie the location, just 100km south of the Arctic Circle.
